title: Empathy: Wisdom
description: Structured conversion of the legacy wisdom slides.

sources.label: Erik H. Erikson, The Life Cycle Completed

slides.title: Wisdom
slides.body: Clinical judgment about timing, intensity, and direction of response.
bullets: Lets the client remain expert on their own experience.
Chooses the next smallest helpful step.
Prevents insight from replacing felt change.

slides.title: Timing and dose
slides.body: Wisdom shows up in how much intervention the moment can metabolize.
steps: Check whether the client is resourced enough for depth.
Name the process before intensifying it.
Do one intervention, then watch the response.
Ask consent for depth: stay with this a bit?
Return to safety when contact narrows or collapses.

slides.title: 3 quick checks
rows: Is this too much or too little?
Am I following process or my idea?
What do I expect to happen?
